description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, accompanied by a desktop tower, keyboard, mouse, and a closed laptop. The monitor features a thin, matte black bezel that frames the display area, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. Its stand is a V-shaped, sturdy base that supports the monitor and provides stability on flat surfaces. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports or branding, and the screen itself is non-reflective. The monitor is designed for use in office or home environments, suitable for placement on desks or workstations. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic and metal materials, typical for modern computer monitors.
description: A sleek, widescreen computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a V-shaped stand, paired with a desktop setup. The monitor has a matte finish and no visible branding or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the widescreen display, thin bezel, and V-shaped stand, with the monitor flanked by a desktop tower, keyboard, mouse, and closed laptop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the monitor and the depth of the V-shaped stand, with the monitor's screen edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the monitor, the structure of the stand, and the rear of the desktop tower; no ports or logos are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monitor's thinness and the side of the V-shaped stand, with minimal detail on the screen or bezel.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, matte black, with straight edges and no visible decorative elements or color contrast. It appears uniform in thickness and has a modern, minimalist style.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a V-shaped base made of what appears to be metal or hard plastic, providing stable support. It is not visibly adjustable and has a sleek, angular design.
attribute_button_placement: A small cluster of buttons is visible on the lower right edge of the monitor's front bezel, grouped together for easy access.
